title: BUG: fix heap buffer overflow in np.strings.find
author: charris
body:
Backport of #28804.

Fixes #28791 

Multiplying by `sizeof(npy_ucs4)` here is nonsense. I'm the one who added this if statement originally. No idea what I was thinking.
